summary: Stun Any wound effect beyond Fatigue Only will

mechanics.name_guess: Stun Any wound effect beyond Fatigue Only will
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 117 > npcs > Stun Any wound effect beyond Fatigue Only will
mechanics.excerpt: Stun Any wound effect beyond Fatigue Only will result in the char- acter being stunned_ This effect takes place at the end of the phase in which he suffered the wound, stunned character can: not move (and considered to have stood still regardless of his last Movement Action attacked) make attacks until spends Simple Action t0 recover from being stunned and he suffers +2 TN modifier to all actions he must make while stunned such as defending himself in melee combat; stunned character does not suffer any additional effects if he stunned again before he recovers_ Recoverlng Fatigue Fatigue can be recovered during combat by spending Complex Action This recovers 106 Fatigue (to minimum of Fatigue).
